title: nonatelia stercoraria
intro: Nonatelia stercoraria, also known as False Dill or Wild Dill, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve flatulence, and ease menstrual cramps. The plant's health benefits include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, Nonatelia stercoraria is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote digestive health and alleviate various symptoms associated with digestive disorders.
